title: Grangea lyrata

The Compositae family is further divided into several subfamilies, and Grangea lyrata belongs to the subfamily Cichorioideae. The subfamily Cichorioideae includes a wide range of plants, from annuals to perennials, and many of its members have edible roots or leaves. The specific classification of Grangea lyrata is further detailed within the subfamily Cichorioideae, but it is generally recognized as a member of this diverse and widespread plant group.
